name: New Zealand Pavlova
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 180°C.
2. Using an electric mixer, beat egg whites and sugar for 10 minutes or until thick and glossy.
3. Mix vinegar, vanilla essence, and cornflour together.
4. Add the mixture to the meringue and beat on high speed for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Line an oven tray with baking paper (do not grease).
6. Draw a 22 cm circle on the baking paper.
7. Spread the pavlova mixture evenly within 2 cm of the edge of the circle, keeping it as round as possible.
8. Smooth the top surface.
9. Place the pavlova in the oven and turn the oven temperature down to 100°C.
10. Bake the pavlova for 1 hour.
11. Turn off the oven and open the door slightly.
12. Leave the pavlova in the oven until it is cold.
13. Carefully lift the pavlova onto a serving plate.
14. Decorate with whipped cream, sliced kiwi fruits, and the pulp of fresh passion fruit.
